location: Sold by a Nomadic Merchant tucked past a hole in the ground just downhill/north of Bellum Church, in northern Liurnia of the Lakes, for 3,500 runes.

source.name: Nomadic Merchant (North Liurnia, near Bellum Church)

tactics: No fight required — reach Bellum Church, then look for the hole/incline leading down past the church to find the merchant sitting by a fire.
It's the priciest Light Bow to buy (3,500 runes) and has the highest overall stat requirement of the group (15 Str/15 Dex), so early-game characters may need to two-hand it or level up first.
Don't confuse this Nomadic Merchant with other traveling merchants elsewhere in Liurnia — this specific one by Bellum Church is the only source.
lore: Layered together from multiple materials for reinforcement, this composite bow punishes an unpracticed archer but rewards one with the raw attributes to draw it properly.

builds.name: Dexterity-focused archer
builds.why: Has the highest Dexterity scaling (D) of any Light Bow, paired with the higher-cost Mighty Shot skill for real sustained arrow damage.

builds.name: Quality (Str/Dex) secondary ranged
builds.why: Its balanced 15/15 requirement slots naturally into a quality-stat melee build that's already investing in both Strength and Dexterity.
